summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Autonomous Maintenance (AM) Checklist module - backend APIs, public kiosk, in-app module, machine drawer integration, and regression tests. Backend: 97.7% success (43/44 tests passed). Frontend: All major features working correctly including tri-state checklist, shift-based submissions, PDF generation, and RBAC controls.

minor_bugs.issue: Flagged-issues notifications not found during test run (may be timing issue or test submission was all OK)
minor_bugs.impact: Low - timeline events are working, notifications may be working but not captured in test

integration_issues.issue: Click timeout on Red Tag button after Breakdown dialog was opened (overlay interception)
integration_issues.note: Dialog does open successfully, but subsequent click has overlay issue. Not blocking.
